user_message: I'd like to extend our trial by another week please. We're still evaluating and need more time before committing.

args.notes: Customer has already used the maximum 2 trial extensions per Section 7.2.

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Trial extension request. Trial is active (ends today).
Step 2: trial_extensions_used = 2. Section 7.2: max 2 per account lifetime.
Step 3: Cannot extend. Must inform customer.
MISS: Urgency (trial ends today) pushes toward action.

wrong_but_tempting.why_tempting: Simple request. Trial ends today. Easy to miss that extensions are maxed out.
